meaning: n.[宗](尤指讲解<<圣经>>的)布道,(冗长乏味的)说教
examples: She gave us a little homily about family values.
He launched into a homily on family relationships.
During his homily, Pope Benedict addressed the issue of unity, which has been a theme of his visit.
They make us listen to a homily in the gratified interval between two courses.
The pope made this possibility even more apparent in his homily at Mount Nevo.
